response.overview: is it experimental? number 3 uses repetition and photographs of the artist’s chaotic and cramped production environment to expose the working conditions that plague experimental filmmakers without access to a professional studio or equipment. The repeated phrase “I can’t work like this” is true, in that the lack of time and resources can indeed limit creativity, but also tongue in cheek, as Pelling and many other artists in a similar position continue to produce important and relevant film and video works under these constraints.
response.title: is it experimental? number 3
